description: Onboarding stage 04 (pain mining). Advisor naturally mines pain along the four funnels (height / immunity / nutrition / vision-brain) by following the parent's lead, never directly asking buy/no-buy. Guided_exploration primary, emotional_support tolerable.

turns.user_input: 他平时挺挑食的，肉蛋奶都不太爱吃。
换季的时候特别容易感冒，几乎一变天就中招。
我现在该不该给他买点补的呀？
